positive: A vibrant, abstract celestial scene featuring a stylized, glowing constellation of geometric forms and deep-sea bioluminescence. The composition must be perfectly balanced and symmetrical, suitable for a central chest print. Use strong contrast between the deep indigo and black background and the neon, electric blue, turquoise, and magenta glowing elements. Style should be Neo-Art Nouveau combined with minimalist geometric vaporwave. The light source is internal and emanating from the elements themselves. Crisp lines, clean silhouettes, high saturation, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, noise, watermark, text, writing, low quality, artifacts, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, poorly drawn hands, bad anatomy, cartoon, realistic, logo, signature, messy, busy background, distracting elements
